CRITICAL RULES  DO NOT VIOLATE ANY OF THESE
RULE 1  META TITLE RULES:
NO dashes   NO pipes   NO parentheses   NO colons   NO ampersands   NO special characters of any kind
Only plain English words are allowed in meta titles
Meta title must be under 60 characters
Primary keyword MUST appear in first 5 words of title
Brand name NepaCal should appear at end of title
WRONG example:  EMI Calculator | Loan EMI Nepal - NepaCal
RIGHT example:  EMI Calculator Nepal Loan Payment NepaCal
RULE 2  META DESCRIPTION RULES:
NO dashes   NO pipes   NO parentheses   NO colons   NO special characters
Only plain natural English sentences
Must be between 130 and 160 characters
Must contain primary keyword naturally
Must clearly state the user benefit
Must include NepaCal as brand reference
WRONG example:  Calculate your EMI - easy & fast | for Nepal | at NepaCal.com
RIGHT example:  Calculate monthly EMI for home car or personal loans in Nepal. Free EMI calculator with full amortization schedule at NepaCal
RULE 3  KEYWORD CLUSTER RULES:
Each page must have exactly one focus primary keyword
Each cluster must contain 7 to 10 total keywords including primary
All keywords in a cluster must be semantically related to the page topic
No keyword cannibalization  same keyword cannot be primary for two different pages
Nepal specific variations must be included for finance and date tools
Supporting keywords should include both short and long tail variations
RULE 4  CONTENT STRUCTURE RULES:
H1 must exactly match or closely match the primary keyword
First paragraph must contain primary keyword in first 100 words
Include 2 to 3 H2 headings using supporting keywords
Add FAQ section with 3 common questions using PAA keywords
Calculator pages need schema markup  SoftwareApplication or WebApplication type
Add breadcrumb schema on all pages
RULE 5  SEARCH INTENT RULES:
Informational pages  explain how the calculator works and include educational content
Transactional pages  focus on instant results and clear call to action
Commercial pages  include comparisons and trust signals
Do not mix intents on a single page
RULE 6  NEPAL SPECIFIC RULES:
All Nepal specific tools must include BS AD date system references
Nepal finance tools must reference current Nepal tax rates
Use terms like Nepal Rupees NPR not just dollar amounts
Include Nepali context for all finance calculators
Nepali date converter pages must clarify Bikram Sambat BS vs Gregorian AD
